title: Daily Time Tracking Overview for Quick Gap Detection
excerpt: Other CRMs have the ability for users to see, at a glance, everything they have logged time for in a day. This helps ensure there are no gaps in logged time. It would make the most sense for this timeline to be visible i…

posts.author: ryanw (Ryan Winslade)
posts.cookedHtml:
Other CRMs have the ability for users to see, at a glance, everything they have logged time for in a day. This helps ensure there are no gaps in logged time. It would make the most sense for this timeline to be visible in the My Work section, so each user can rectify any gaps at the end of each day.

Here is how the timeline looks in Accelo:

image1339×343 47.6 KB

I don’t think Accelo chose the simplest way to lay out the daily personal timeline, but hopefully this helps you see what I mean. At the very least, it shows how much time was logged (or at least allocated) and what tasks are included in that logged/allocated time.

In Monday, if one was able to quickly view the overall amount of time they had tracked during the day - and where it was tracked to - it would help users hit their daily goals for logging time, which would obviously increase the accuracy of tracked time.

Thanks!
